name: Vidyard Video Platform API
what_it_does: Vidyard REST API for B2B video platform. Enables AI agents to query video analytics, retrieve viewer engagement data, manage video libraries, access player configurations, and integrate video intelligence into sales and marketing workflows. Vidyard is a leading video platform for sales outreach, customer success, and marketing with detailed viewer tracking.
use_cases: Querying video view analytics and engagement metrics from sales intelligence agents
Retrieving viewer tracking data (who watched what) from CRM enrichment agents
Managing video library and sharing links from sales workflow automation agents
Integrating video engagement signals into lead scoring and CRM agents
not_for: Consumer video hosting (Vidyard is B2B focused)
High-scale public video delivery (use Vimeo or Mux)
Live streaming without Vidyard enterprise features
best_when: A B2B sales or marketing team using Vidyard wants AI agents to surface video engagement data — who watched, how long, and when — to prioritize outreach and enrich CRM records.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Viewer tracking data reveals individual viewing behavior. Handle with GDPR and CCPA compliance. Do not expose viewer PII to unauthorized agents.

auth.notes: Vidyard OAuth 2.0 for user-level access and API keys for server integrations. Developer portal for app registration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: basic video hosting with limited analytics
pricing.notes: B2B video platform with free tier. Paid plans unlock detailed viewer analytics and CRM integrations.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Viewer tracking data reveals individual user behavior — GDPR/CCPA applies
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Viewer analytics require paid plan — free tier has limited analytics access
Video upload API is separate from analytics API — different auth flows
Rate limits undocumented — throttle for bulk analytics queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Individual viewer tracking data including watch duration and identity. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. OAuth with scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Individual viewer PII including identity and behavior data. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. CCPA compliance for viewer data.
